description: Multi-language paragraph mixing Korean, Spanish, French, and English
passage: 어제 나는 international food festival에 갔어요. Hadía muchos platos deliciosos de diferentes países. I tried sushi for the first time and it was absolutely delicious. Il y avait aussi des crêpes françaises magnifiques. 가장 인상 깊었던 건 the incredible variety of flavors from around the world. C'était une expérience formidable que je n'oublierai jamais. 다음에는 친구들과 함께 가려고요.
